description.en_US: Contact/address book plugin. Multi-phone/email, group tags, sort & filter. Type /name to insert a contact link, /add-contact to quick-add. Top bar button for one-click access. Click phone numbers to copy. Full i18n (zh_CN/en_US).
description.zh_CN: 通讯录插件。多号码、多邮箱、分组标签、排序筛选。输入/名字插入联系人链接，/add-contact 快速添加。右上角插件栏一键打开。点击号码复制。完整中英文国际化。
description.default: Contact/address book plugin. Multi-phone/email, group tags, sort & filter. Type /name to insert contact link, /add-contact to quick-add. Top bar button for one-click access.
